narrative:
Archer Twp (precinct in Harrison County) has 231 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.5 percentage points.
